findings.description: Section s1 references three PascalCase class names in the related handlers table — `HttpRequestJavaPackageMapping`, `DataReadHandler`, and `FwHeaderReader` — but none appear in the s1 hints list.
findings.source_evidence: Related handlers table contains ':doc:`HttpRequestJavaPackageMapping`', ':doc:`DataReadHandler`', and ':doc:`../reader/FwHeaderReader`' as direct references in the 概要 section.
